title: Dynamic pvp crosshair
description: this is a pvp crosshair mod that will help players see when an entity comes into range of hit
body:
# Dynamic PvP Crosshair
This is a client-side mod that replaces the vanilla crosshair to give you more information during modern PvP combat (like mace fights and elytra dogfights). It tracks your reach distance and timing to help you land critical hits.
## What it does:
### Distance Text
Shows the exact block distance to the entity you are currently looking at.
### Crit Indicator
The crosshair changes color when your weapon cooldown and fall distance are ready for a critical hit.
### Elytra Mode
Shows a custom Elytra icon while flying. You can set this to automatically hide and show your combat crosshair when a target comes into range.
### Customizable
You can change the crosshair style, text scale, and all the colors (hit color, crit color, text color) in the mod's config menu.
### Client-Side Only
You can use this on any vanilla server, realm, or minigame network. The server does not need to have the mod installed.
### Toggle Key
You can turn the custom crosshair on and off at any time by pressing O (can be changed in your controls).
## Compatibility
### Fabric/Quilt
1.21.4 through 1.21.11
### NeoForge
1.21.6 through 1.21.11
## Required Dependencies
### Cloth Config API
(Required for both Fabric and NeoForge) Builds the settings menu.
### Architectury API
(Required for both Fabric and NeoForge) Helps the mod run on both loaders.
### Fabric API
(Required for Fabric only) Core Fabric systems
### Mod Menu
(Required for Fabric only) Adds the "Mods" button to the game so you can actually open the config screen.
